HGSS.057.0000:
Morty: The legendary Pokémon did not
choose me...\f
But that does not mean that I have
lost out on my future.\f
I will continue my training until I
discover a new future for me.\f
Say, do you want to be part of my
training? [0200,0000]
HGSS.057.0002:
Morty: Give me a call on Tuesday night if
you want a battle!
HGSS.057.0004:
Morty: So, will you be part of my
training? [0200,0000]
HGSS.057.0005:
Morty: Hi, it’s you!\f
How about taking a picture
here with me as a memento? [0200,0000]
HGSS.057.0006:
Morty: All right!
Come and stand next to me.\f
HGSS.057.0007:
Morty: Mmmm...
This is a pretty good picture!
HGSS.057.0008:
Morty: I understand...
you must be busy with things.
HGSS.057.0009:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC and delete
some pictures.
